summary: Frontend UI/UX regression of the redesigned /design-requests-new page (command-strip consolidation). Logged in as CEO surya.yadavalli@nylaairwater.earth / test123. Exercised every review item via Playwright at 1920x1080 and 390x844. All key testids present; every interaction works and reflects in URL as designed. No console/page errors on the page.
critical_code_review_comments: DesignRequestsNew.js is 666 lines — right at the recommended 700-line ceiling. Sub-components (QueueSwitcher / StatusFilter / AdvancedFilters / ViewToggle / RequestTable) could be moved to /components/marketing/ if additional features are added.

The 250ms debounce on search is implemented via a fresh setTimeout tied to the entire fetchList useCallback, which re-fires the timer on every state change (queue, sort, state, page, view, etc.) — not just on the search text. Effect is fine (extra debounce noise) but if that becomes noticeable, isolate the debounce to `search` only.
In `useEffect` that syncs URL, the dependency list has an eslint-disable comment. Consider fixing dependencies properly (setSp is stable but explicitly). Cosmetic.
The `AdvancedFilters` popover keeps a stray dropdown styling class `focus:ring-emerald-600/20` — consistent with the rest of the file, no action needed.
`counts.states` is read before it is loaded (initial render), so the StatusFilter briefly renders 0 chips; the mobile skeleton is fine, but consider showing a skeleton chip strip while counts load.
test_credentials: CEO surya.yadavalli@nylaairwater.earth / test123 (tenant nyla-air-water). Seed DRN-2026-0001 (Neck Tags, urgent, Production In Progress) id 24d674f4-74ac-4752-992e-9fc73c801bc0.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Redesigned Design Requests - New page passes end-to-end. Verified: (1) Command strip contains queue-segment-control, mr-search-input, status-filter-trigger, advanced-filters-trigger, view-toggle-list-kanban (2) Queue tabs tab-all / tab-my_raised / tab-my_assigned switch queue and update ?queue= (3) Search debounces and updates ?q= (4) Status popover renders status-option-all + 8 state-chip-{key} chips with counts; picking state-chip-production_in_progress filters + sets ?state=; clicking status-option-all clears it (single-select confirmed) (5) Advanced-filters popover exposes native <select> mr-filter-type/dept/requestedby; picking Neck Tags type sets ?type= and mr-clear-filters resets all three (6) Sort headers mr-sort-{field} toggle asc/desc and update ?sort= (7) Row click navigates to /design-requests-new/{id} (8) Kanban view renders unchanged and mr-view-list/mr-view-kanban toggle persists in ?view= (9) Export CSV downloads (design-requests-new-2026-07-05.csv, 212 bytes); New Request navigates to /new (10) Empty state 'No requests found' surfaces on non-matching Submitted filter (11) Mobile @ 390px stacks the command strip and renders mr-mobile-list + mr-card-{id}; urgent accent shows the rose left border. Only console errors observed are the expected pre-login 401s from AuthContext bootstrap.
rca of the issue: N/A — redesign passed all interaction, URL-sync, filter, export and navigation checks.
